Task Name: Borden groundwater emergency remediation modeling and constrained multi-objective optimization
Software: Python 3.10+; numpy; pandas; scipy; matplotlib; optional pymoo; CPU only
Prompt Summary: Agent must calibrate a pump-response transport surrogate from public remediation experiments and solve robust constrained multi-objective emergency dispatch with multi-phase pumping and treatment-type choices. Required outputs include model.py answer.json results.json and report.md.
Best Completion: Baseline is calibrated below 15; expert solutions improve by learning arrival-time shift/capture/rebound behavior and doing robust multi-scenario optimization.
Authenticity: This task reflects real pump-and-treat emergency remediation planning and groundwater risk reduction workflows.
Workload: Data understanding 2h; public remediation calibration 4h; hidden-plan generalization 5h; robust constrained multi-objective optimization 8h; report and validation 3h.
Inputs: public_problem_config.json; borden_grid.npz; public_monitoring_data.csv; remediation_wells.csv; public_risk_receptors.csv; public_remediation_experiments.json; public_remediation_observations.csv; public_remediation_config.json; tools/local_validate_remediation_model.py; baseline model.py
Scoring: Total 100. Format/constraints/interface 5; pump-response model generalization 45 = 15 public validation + 20 hidden random plans + 10 stress/OOD plans; robust dispatch 40 with continuous model_gate; workflow/report 10. Hard caps only for invalid/cheating/interface failure; scores keep 3 decimals.
